rows.label: tlk4520015501_msg0001
rows.name:
I gave Mahl that pendant
you helped me with!

rows.label: tlk4520015501_msg0002
rows.name:
Apparently he doesn't need to move
to Invidia anymore. It seems all
sorts of things happened...

rows.label: tlk4520015501_msg0003
rows.name:
But the important thing is, he
really liked the pendant! He
said it cheered him up, even!
